title: AgePrediction
description: Age prediction result for a first name from the Agify.io API.

count.description: Number of data points used to make the prediction. Higher count indicates greater confidence.

name.description: The first name that was evaluated.

age.description: Predicted age for the given name. Null if there is insufficient data for a prediction.

country_id.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code used for localization, if provided in the request.
